fn_def_list.fn_code:
Eh_frame::Eh_frame()
  : Output_section_data(Output_data::default_alignment()),
    eh_frame_hdr_(NULL),
    cie_offsets_(),
    unmergeable_cie_offsets_(),
    mappings_are_done_(false),
    final_data_size_(0)
{
}
